caption: A man is seated in a recording studio, wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK THE MAN" printed on it, a black baseball cap, a gold chain, and a gold watch. He wears large over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a professional microphone. The background features a white wall decorated with star motifs and the recurring text "UNRIVALED HUSTLE." To his right, a sign reads "BOSS TALK 101" with smaller text below stating "Be the Biggest Boss." A logo for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is visible in the bottom left of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position with his left hand resting against his chin. He looks slightly to his right, shifting his gaze and slightly adjusting his facial expression as he listens or prepares to speak, while the camera remains static.
